data.title: Marlboro Maker Philip Morris Highlights Strong Q3 Performance On Higher Prices, Issues Upbeat Annual Forecast
data.description: Philip Morris reports strong Q3 2024 earnings with revenue up 8.4% YoY and adjusted EPS of $1.91. Smoke-free products drive growth in shipments and profitability.

data.title: Jack Altman Says AI Voice Tech Could 'End Up Being As Big Or Bigger Than AI Text,' Sam Altman Jokes About Hiring Him At OpenAI
data.description: The conversation between the Altman brothers comes at a time when AI voice technology is under the spotlight.

data.title: Cocaine Pizza Becomes Best-Seller At Düsseldorf Restaurant, Leading To Drug Ring Bust
Jinko Sees Sunnier Skies In Germany With New Fundraising Plan
data.description:
Key Takeaways:


	Shanghai-listed Jinko Solar Co. plans to raise more than $600 million through a GDR sale in Germany, using the funds to pay for expansions in China and the U.S.
	The company appears to be selling the global depositary receipts (GDRs) at a relatively large discount to their price in Shanghai


By Doug Young
